new_classes.label_en: Other Still Wine in Containers of 2 Litres or Less (CN 22042198)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Stillwein in Behältnissen bis zu 2 Litern (KN 22042198)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes in containers of 2 litres or less that bears no PDO, no PGI, and is not Tokaj wine and not semi-sparkling; classified under CN subheading 2204 21 98 (Chapter 22). Subject to the dry-extract requirements of additional notes 4 and 5 to Chapter 22.

coverage_explanation: The main distinguishing criteria captured are: (1) still wine (non-sparkling, non-semi-sparkling), (2) in containers ≤ 2 L, (3) no PDO/PGI/Tokaj designation — all of which place this product in the residual "other" slot among 2204 21 xx codes. The complement restrictions on PDO, PGI, and Tokaj origin qualities reflect the exclusion of the named sub-categories (22042168/74/78, 22042180, and Tokaj codes). Not fully captured: (a) the precise quantitative dry-extract thresholds from additional notes 4 and 5 (sugar content in g/l correlated with actual alcoholic strength) — these would require dedicated datatype properties and range restrictions not yet in the TBox; (b) the exhaustive enumeration of all sibling codes excluded (22042111–22042196) is implied by the complement/disjointness pattern but not made fully explicit. Coverage is therefore estimated at 0.72.
